stories.headline: Death toll in Gaza since ‘ceasefire’ with Israel goes past 1,000

stories.summary: A bus carrying a children's football team from Belarus in Russia's border Bryansk region was hit by a drone, according to Russian officials. Moscow claims it was attacked by Ukraine, but Kyiv denies it carried out any operations in the area.

stories.headline: Finland's parliament passes bill in support of lifting total ban on nuclear weapons

stories.headline: Rutte heads to Washington to smooth NATO tensions ahead of July summit

Relations between the US and its NATO allies have been strained after Trump accused European nations of abandoning the US during its war in Iran.

stories.headline: A First-Ever Default Shakes an $80 Billion Corner of Muni Market

Incoming Irish presidency, in the meantime, says it will work as quickly as possible.
